'''Horror from the Deep''' is an intermediate quest revolving around the mysterious disappearance of [[Jossik]], keeper of the [[Lighthouse]] near the [[Fremennik Province]]. As the title suggests, the investigations lead to the discovery of very dangerous creatures living beneath the lighthouse.

==Details==

The Council would greatly appreciate it if somebody could discover for them what has happened to this most vital landscape feature.

==Walkthrough==
===Lighthouse trouble===
{{Needed|60 [[steel nails]], a [[hammer]], and 2 [[plank]]s|recommended=Fast travel method to the Barbarian Outpost and back|skills={{SCP|Agility|35}} {{Boostable|yes}} to enter the pipe inside the [[Barbarian Outpost Agility Course|agility course]]}}
[[File:Larrissa chathead.png|left]]
Head to the [[Lighthouse]], located north of [[Barbarian Outpost]], reachable via the [[Basalt rock|basalt platforms]]. If travelling from the outpost, you can obtain the required planks from the north-east end along the fence. Bring [[food]] as the platforms have a high failure rate even with decent agility, and a max hit of 10. Alternatively, [[fairy ring]] {{fairycode|alp}} will take you right by the lighthouse.

Speak to [[Larrissa]], who will tell the player that her boyfriend lives in the lighthouse. She is worried about him, as the light has gone out and the door is now mysteriously locked. Ask how you can help; she is stranded here, as a storm destroyed the bridge to the east, and she wants you to repair it. She also requests you retrieve a spare key to the lighthouse from her cousin at the [[Barbarian Outpost]].

[[File:Horror from the Deep bridge.png|thumb|Repairing the bridge.|220px]]

Some distance east of Larrissa is a broken bridge that connects to the mainland. With a [[hammer]] and 60 [[steel nails]] in your inventory, use a [[plank]] on the side of the bridge you are on, then click to jump to the other side to use a [[plank]] there as well. Depending on your agility level, you may take slight damage from the leap. Once the bridge is fixed, you will be able to cross without failure, despite the bridge not looking any different. 

Check your quest log to make sure it says that you've fixed the bridge, then head to the [[Barbarian Outpost]]. Speak to [[Gunnjorn]], found inside the [[Agility]] course, through the pipe ({{SCP|Agility|35}}). Tell him Larrissa is in trouble and needs her spare key back, and he will give you the [[lighthouse key]].

===Fixing the Lightomatic Deluxe 500===
{{Needed|A [[tinderbox]], [[molten glass]], and [[swamp tar]]}}
 [[File:Lighting mechanism (broken).png|left|100px]]
Return to Larrissa. She asks you to go inside the lighthouse and find out what happened to [[Jossik]]. Enter the building; you will appear in an [[instance]] with Larrissa inside. The furniture is smashed and there are blood splatters and claw marks on the floor and walls. She asks you to repair the light mechanism to prevent any shipwrecks. She does not know how to, but says Jossik probably had some manuals lying around.

By searching the bookcase on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}}, you may find the [[manual|lighthouse manual]], Jossik's [[Journal (Horror from the Deep)|journal]], and his [[diary (Horror from the Deep)|uncle's diary]]. Reading these  is not required to progress the quest. If you choose to read them, the manual will describe how to maintain the [[Lightomatic]] Deluxe 500, with a troubleshooting FAQ section at the end of the book. The journal describes how Jossik became the lighthouse keeper after his uncle disappeared, and soon began to hear voices. It ends with Jossik's decision to investigate the strange noises coming from the basement. In his diary [[Silas]] discusses the monstrous [[dagannoth]] in-between incoherent ramblings, as well as his construction of a metal door in the basement. He mentions that to unlock the door, 'the key' is fire, air, water, and earth runes, as well as weapons.

Head to the {{FloorNumber|uk=2}} and use some [[molten glass]] and [[swamp tar]] on the lighting mechanism in order to fix it, then light the tar with a [[tinderbox]]. Return to Larrissa, who requests that you do everything to find Jossik.

===The door is the key===
{{Needed|One of each elemental [[runes|rune]], 1 [[arrow]], and 1 [[sword]]}}
[[File:Horror from the Deep - The strange door.png|left|120px]]
Go down the iron ladder into the basement to find the door mentioned in Jossik's journal. You appear in a kind of sea cavern, with further passage blocked by the [[strange wall (Lighthouse)|metal door]]. It has a monstrous face in its centre surrounded by six icons: the four runes, a sword and an arrow.

Use all of your basic elemental [[runes]] on the door ([[Fire rune|fire]], [[Water rune|water]], [[Earth rune|earth]], and [[Air rune|air]]). You may bring a full stack of each, as the door will only use one rune. Use your [[sword]] on the door (any type), and then an [[arrow]] (any type except [[ogre arrows|ogre]] and [[training arrows|training]]). Bolts will not work. '''You do not get these back!'''

===Horrors from the deep===
{{Needed|Combat equipment}}

Once you have used all of the items on the door, it will unlock. Ensure you have your combat equipment with you, and go through the eastern part of the door and down the ladder. Be prepared to fight both a [[dagannoth]] and the [[dagannoth mother]], then talk to [[Jossik]] sitting injured by the ladder, who says he was trapped down here by creatures that attacked him. When the player suggests they should return upstairs to find help, a level 100 [[dagannoth]] emerges from the sea and attacks!
[[File:Horror from the Deep first dagannoth.png|thumb|Safespotting the first dagannoth.|200px]]
The [[Dagannoth (Horror from the Deep)|dagannoth]] only attacks with melee and can be killed with any combat style. You can utilise a [[safespot]] by standing in the southern corner of the pond to the west.

After defeating it, Jossik says that was not the creature that had attacked him but one of its babies. A cutscene follows in which a larger dagannoth appears from the waters, revealing itself to be the much stronger [[dagannoth mother]]. She attacks with both ranged and melee, and changes colour every 18 seconds through a fixed cycle, indicated through a chat message {{Mes|The Dagannoth changes to blue...}} as well as visually. Her six colours correspond to the four elemental spell types, ranged, and melee. For as long as she remains that colour, she can only be damaged through use of that particular attack style.

[[File:Horror from the Deep - Dagannoth mother safespot.png|thumb|200px|A safespot for fighting the dagannoth mother. Protect from Missiles should be active at all times during the fight.]]
The same safespot used for the regular dagannoth is not as effective here, as she may eventually attack you. You can use the stalagmites in the south-east corner of the room to [[flinch]] with a melee weapon, using [[Protect from Missiles]] to avoid her ranged attack when using the other combat styles. By default, the mother will use ranged at a distance and melee up close, but may detect [[Prayer]] changes and automatically use the opposite attack type.

You can defeat the [[Dagannoth mother]] without using all of the combat styles, and may choose to simply wait in a [[safespot]] (or up the ladder) while she is the wrong colour. You could also use these pauses to heal. As she has a weakness to [[Earth spells|earth]], this is the most effective source of damage. [[Magic]] and [[Ranged]] is equally effective, but she has a higher resistance to [[melee]].

'''Note''': The [[Twinflame staff]] is not recommended, as it will remain on [[Earth spells]] as the mother's weakness, even if she has changed colour.

{{Color|red|Warning:}} Any dropped items will be unobtainable after defeating the boss. You may still loot your items if you die before killing her.

Defeating the [[Dagannoth mother]] will automatically complete the quest, and you will receive a [[rusty casket]]. The casket can be obtained from [[Jossik]] upstairs if you had a full inventory.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Horror from the Deep
|image = [[File:Horror from the Deep reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 2
|rewards = *{{SCP|Magic|4,662.5}} [[Magic]] experience
*{{SCP|Strength|4,662.5}} [[Strength]] experience
*{{SCP|Ranged|4,662.5}} [[Ranged]] experience
*A [[damaged book]] of your choice which, when complete, will become: a [[Holy book]] ([[Saradomin]]), an [[Unholy book]] ([[Zamorak]]), or a [[Book of balance]] ([[Guthix]]).
**Further damaged [[God book|books]] can be purchased from Jossik for 5,000 coins each, even if you have not filled your other book(s).
*Access to the [[Lighthouse]] [[general store]] and the [[Dagannoth]] caves underneath.

Unlocks:
* [[Dagannoth mother]] accessible in the [[Nightmare Zone]].
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Horror from the Deep is required for the following:
*[[Recipe for Disaster]] - [[Recipe for Disaster/Defeating the Culinaromancer|Defeating the Culinaromancer]]
*[[Rag and Bone Man II]] ([[The Fremennik Trials]] can be completed as an alternative prerequisite)

==Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|quest}}

==Trivia==
*While in instanced versions of the lighthouse, you no longer see the fairy ring outside which was added later.
*The location, characters, books, diaries, monsters, are paying an obvious tribute to the works of [[wikipedia:H. P. Lovecraft|H. P. Lovecraft]].
*Despite being somewhat repaired during the quest, the broken bridge's examine will still refer to jumping off it rather than crossing it on the walkway.
*In [[Diary (Horror from the Deep)|Silas's diary]], the colours white, blue, brown and red refer to the elemental runes needed for the door, while yellow and green refers to the sword of the warrior and the arrow of the huntsman, respectively.
*Unlike most quests, the reward scroll for this quest congratulates you on "surviving" the quest, rather than completing it.

{{Horror from the Deep}}
